hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>process.stdout.write(JSON.parse(d).tool_input.command))"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git\s+commit'; then bun run validate > /dev/null 2>&1; EXIT=$?; if [ $EXIT -ne 0 ]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"bun run validate failed (exit '"$EXIT"'). Fix issues before committing."}}'; fi; fi
